Name: Singapore National Youth Orchestra
Tagline: The Singapore National Youth Orchestra is managed by the Singapore Symphony Group, and recognised by the Ministry of Education as a National Project of…
About: The SNYO family comprises two orchestras: the Singapore National Youth Orchestra and Singapore National Youth Sinfonia, with over 180 members aged 10 to 24 from more than 70 schools across Singapore, guided by professional musicians in rehearsals, sectionals, and masterclasses. To inspire a lifelong love for music and a dedication to exceptional orchestral performance.
Philosophy: Through the playing of orchestral classical music, we nurture future generations of musicians and build a vibrant music community for Singapore. The Singapore National Youth Orchestra showcases the extraordinary capability of our youth.
Outcomes: The Singapore National Youth Orchestra develops musical talent and fosters teamwork, discipline, and artistic excellence among young musicians.
Admissions: Positions are available in all orchestral sections: strings, woodwinds, brass, harp and percussion. You are welcome to apply for our auditions if you are aged 10 to 18 (as at the year of audition)!
Quote: Uniting young musicians in harmony, we nurture talent, inspire passion, and create the symphony of tomorrow.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The Singapore National Youth Orchestra's coaches are seasoned professionals, many holding advanced music degrees and international performance experience. They employ a mentorship approach, ensuring personalized guidance in both technical and artistic development.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The Singapore National Youth Orchestra offers a supportive environment with access to pastoral care and peer mentoring. Regular workshops focus on stress management and building a strong community among members.
Performance.Academic Integration: The orchestra's programme complements academic pursuits by offering flexible rehearsal schedules. It promotes a holistic educational philosophy, encouraging students to balance musical excellence with academic responsibilities.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Alumni of the Singapore National Youth Orchestra have successfully pursued music degrees at prestigious institutions like the Royal College of Music. Members frequently excel in national and international music competitions, showcasing their exceptional talent.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The orchestra boasts state-of-the-art rehearsal spaces equipped with high-quality instruments and acoustics. Members have access to a comprehensive music library and digital resources for enhanced learning.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Progress is tracked through regular performance assessments and feedback sessions with coaches. Parents receive detailed reports on their child's development, ensuring transparency and continuous improvement in the programme.
